---
title: "MSS Pipelines Guidance"
---

# Welcome to MSS Pipelines Guidance

Design, build, and maintain data pipelines that are **Maintainable, Scalable, and Sustainable (MSS)**. This site is your one-stop resource for practical guides, technical reference, and foundational concepts—organised using the [Diátaxis documentation model](https://diataxis.fr/).

---

## Start Here

- **What is End-to-End RAP?** — [Learn the concepts](explanation/end-to-end-rap.qmd)
- **Quickstart Tutorial** — [Standalone batch task on Cloud Run Jobs](tutorials/stand-alone-batch-task-tutorial.qmd)

---

## Explore the Documentation

### Tutorials
Step-by-step learning journeys to help you get hands-on with MSS pipelines.
- [All tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd)

### How-to Guides
Practical, task-focused instructions for real-world problems.
- [Browse how-to guides](how-to/index.qmd)

### Reference
Technical details, specifications, and in-depth documentation.
- [Read the reference](reference/index.qmd)

### Explanation
Background, rationale, and key concepts behind MSS pipelines.
- [More explanation topics](explanation/index.qmd)
